title: Traefik Middleware Time Share of Request Duration
app: Splunk Universal Forwarder, Splunk Connect for Syslog, or HTTP Event Collector; `props.conf`/`transforms.conf` for listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=proxy sourcetype="traefik:access"
| eval mw=tonumber(MiddlewareDuration), total=tonumber(Duration)
| eval mw_pct=if(total>0, round(100*mw/total,1), null())
| where mw_pct > 25
| timechart span=5m perc95(mw_pct) by RouterName
description: Auth and compression should not dominate latency budgets.
implementation: If fields absent, export OpenTelemetry traces with span attributes for middleware.
visualization: Time series for rates and latency, top/dedup for hotspots, single-value alerts on health thresholds.
grandmaExplanation: We split latency between middleware and upstream.
